subcodes.first_line: O righteous servant of God! Salvation and prosperity today lie in steadfastness to the Covenant and adherence to the Testament of the Beloved [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صالح حق صلاح و فلاح الیوم ثبوت بر میثاقست و تمسک بعهد و پیمان محبوب
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
